meta.teaching_note: DISCOVERY (not just verify). Hits OpenAlex (free, no key) which covers top-tier venues (IEEE/ACM/Springer/Elsevier) that arXiv misses. Two-stage: rank by citations -> live DOI check -> Verdict gate forces full-text read + human review before any citation. Extend the same way with Semantic Scholar (api.semanticscholar.org), Crossref (api.crossref.org), Unpaywall (full text), or Scopus (key). Model calls use a generic OpenAI-compatible endpoint; notifications are stubs; runs in Docker.
